name: ticket-stream
description: Incident management SaaS boilerplate for software support and operations teams.

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.clean-install: rimraf node_modules client/node_modules server/node_modules package-lock.json client/package-lock.json server/package-lock.json && npm run install-all
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"

author: Zachary Baca
